# Safe-Spend — Fiat-first escrow and spending control for AI agents

> Your agents never overspend.

## What is Safe-Spend?

Safe-Spend provides fiat-first escrow and spending controls for AI agents. Set budgets, enforce policies, and escrow payments — so your agents never overspend. Part of the [AgenticTrust](https://agentictrust.app) suite.

## Core Features

- **Escrow Accounts**: Deposit funds that agents can draw from with policy controls
- **Spending Policies**: Define rules for what agents can spend, how much, and when
- **Budget Caps**: Set hard limits so agents can never exceed their allocation
- **Transaction Logs**: Full audit trail of every agent payment
- **Real-time Monitoring**: Dashboard showing agent spending in real time
- **Dual Authorization**: Works with Agent Authority Vault for two-layer approval

## For Developers

- REST API with API key authentication
- Webhook support for spending events
- Dashboard for managing agent budgets
- Integration with AAV for authority + escrow

## Architecture

- Frontend: React 19 (Vite)
- Backend: Python/FastAPI
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Hosted on Railway

## Owner

AgenticTrust — https://agentictrust.app
